description_long: This chaise features a modern, minimalist design with a rectangular seat upholstered in a muted greenish-gray fabric, accented by tan side panels. Two cylindrical bolster cushions are positioned at either end, providing support for reclining or lounging. The seat is supported by four short, sturdy legs, likely made of metal or wood, with a simple, unadorned finish. The upholstery appears smooth and tightly fitted, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching. The overall silhouette is low and streamlined, making it suitable for urban parks, public lounges, or contemporary outdoor spaces. The color palette and materials suggest durability and comfort for public or semi-public environments.
description: A modern, low-profile chaise with green-gray upholstery, tan accents, and cylindrical bolsters at each end, supported by four simple legs. Its sleek, minimalist design is ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the chaise, both cylindrical bolsters, and the rectangular seat with tan side panels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the chaise, one cylindrical bolster, and the thickness of the seat cushion.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying both bolsters and the seat's rectangular shape with tan accents.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the chaise's length and the end bolster.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest consists of a cylindrical bolster cushion at each end, providing minimal elevation and support for reclining. There is no tall or upright backrest; the bolsters are the only back support elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: There are no traditional armrests, but the cylindrical bolsters at both ends serve as arm or head supports.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and cylindrical, likely made of metal or wood with a simple, unembellished finish. They are positioned at the corners for stability and have a modern, utilitarian appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid in color, with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching. The seat features a green-gray main section with tan side panels.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two cylindrical bolster cushions, one at each end of the chaise, and a single, continuous seat cushion. The bolsters are attached and provide support for reclining or resting arms or head.
